utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 sections by name. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs and a total monthly cost; policies and amounts are provided—fully specified. 2) property_coverage: asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides contents insurance with cost, but does not explicitly mention home insurance; however, 'Property Coverage' is provided with contents insurance cost and total property cost, so for 'home/contents' at least contents with cost is given—this satisfies 'home/contents insurance with costs' minimally. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs is provided with annual plan, add-on, combined policy and total cost—fully specified. 4) additional_services: enhancement services with costs—some services listed but only the bundle discount has a cost; others have no explicit costs. The format says 'any enhancement services with costs'—at least one has a cost; acceptable but arguably not all have costs. Still, item present with some costs. 5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown is provided (subtotal, discount, final monthly, annual, savings, start date)—fully specified. Therefore, all 5 items are included and reasonably specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each selected item in the final coverage plan to the closest matching item name in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Physical Health and LifeFirst Standard Mental Health (map to Primary Health Coverage -> physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan and mental_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan, both rated 9). Property coverage lists PrimeHome Premium Property Coverage, which corresponds to Property Protection -> home_content -> PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 6). Travel coverage includes PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 6 under mobility_coverage -> travel_insurance) and Adventure Travel Coverage (rating 10 under travel_enhancement_services). Additional services like bundle discounts and assistance are not directly rated in the ground truth, so they are not included.
